holy_day.name: New Year's Day
holy_day.description: Feasts at dusk, discussing hopes for the new year until sunrise.

holy_day.name: Wild's Grandeur
holy_day.description: Sailing and venturing into wild places to honor the Wildmother.

holy_day.name: Luck's Favor
holy_day.description: Carousing, merry-making, and good deeds for Halfling luck.

holy_day.name: Elvendawn
holy_day.description: Elaborate music, fine wine, and dancing commemorating elves emerging from the Feywild.

holy_day.name: The Knowing
holy_day.description: Meditation and reflection on learned knowledge.

holy_day.name: Highsun
holy_day.description: Feasting and large bonfires kept burning all night.

holy_day.name: Fizzleboom
holy_day.description: Celebrating failures and lessons learned; explosive displays and pipe smoke illusions.

holy_day.name: Deep Solace
holy_day.description: Isolation and meditation on family; exchange gifts of craftsmanship.

holy_day.name: Harvest Throne
holy_day.description: Elaborate harvest feasts; one empty seat left for the Lawbearer.

holy_day.name: Gatekeeper's Remembrance
holy_day.description: Day of remembrance, solemnity, and respect for the fallen.

holy_day.name: Moonweaver's Masquerade
holy_day.description: Song, dance, drink, pranks, tricks, and masquerades; young lovers seek her blessing.

holy_day.name: Day of Challenging
holy_day.description: Raucous festivals with jousting, wrestling, and martial combats.

holy_day.name: Embertide
holy_day.description: Day of remembrance and respect for fallen defenders of justice.

holy_day.name: Day of Forgiveness
holy_day.description: Forgiving slights and grudges; gift exchange before New Year's Day.

warp.description: The central, fixed moon. Remains in relatively the same position in the sky.
warp.behavior: Exerts predictable, daily tide cycles. Visible every night across all of Astoria.

weft.description: One of the twin ancillary moons.
weft.behavior: Traces a spiraling path around Warp over the monthly cycle. Varies in apparent size and visibility by region.

cross.description: One of the twin ancillary moons.
cross.behavior: Traces a spiraling path around Warp over the monthly cycle. Varies in apparent size and visibility by region.

king_tides.description: All three moons aligned. Exceptionally high and low tides, turbulent currents. Sailors remain dockside or in open sea. Coastal wetlands prone to flooding.

fool_tides.description: Weft and Cross at furthest from Warp, working against its pull. Weakest tidal fluctuations, calm currents, stable shoreline. Ship captains time dangerous passages for these days.
